title: SQLancer crash on complex join
poc: CREATE TABLE t0("c0" DOUBLE PRECISION, "c1" VARCHAR(496));
create view v0(c0, c1) as (select all t0.c0, r'epfNW⟚榢tptPbC{5{ZW}6,R' from t0) with check option;
select sum(all + (cast(t0.c0 as int))) from v0 full outer join t0 on ((cast((cast(v0.c1 as boolean)) not in (true, ((t0.c0)=(t0.c0)), cast(1745166981 as boolean)) as string))ilike(v0.c0));
key_bug_features: full outer join with complex view and cast operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1("a" INT, "b" VARCHAR(255), "c" BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE), (2, 'example', NULL), (3, 'sample', FALSE);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT a, b, CAST(c AS VARCHAR) AS c_str FROM t1 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(v1.a, 0) + (CAST(t1.b AS INT))) FROM v1 FULL OUTER JOIN t1 ON (v1.c_str ILIKE CONCAT('%', t1.b, '%'));
CREATE TABLE t2("x" DOUBLE PRECISION, "y" DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
